recommendations.title: The Weasel's Tale
recommendations.overview: A group of old actors and filmmakers tries to resist the efforts of a young couple to kick them out of their mansion.

recommendations.title: Son of the Bride

recommendations.title: Underdogs
recommendations.overview: All seems well for Amadeo, a shy but talented foosball player who's in love with the free-spirited Laura. Trouble strikes when Grosso, the world's best soccer player, returns home with plans to destroy the village and turn it into a new sports stadiu

recommendations.title: Rashomon
recommendations.overview: Four people recount different versions of the story of a man's murder and the rape of his wife.

recommendations.title: The Workshop

recommendations.title: The Girl with the Dragon Tattoo
recommendations.overview: Swedish thriller based on Stieg Larsson's novel about a male journalist and a young female hacker. In the opening of the movie, Mikael Blomkvist, a middle-aged publisher for the magazine Millennium, loses a libel case brought by corrupt Swedish indus

recommendations.title: Reptile
recommendations.overview: Following the brutal murder of a young real estate agent, a hardened detective attempts to uncover the truth in a case where nothing is as it seems, and by doing so dismantles the illusions in his own life.

recommendations.title: All Good Things
recommendations.overview: Newly-discovered facts, court records and speculation are used to elaborate the true love story and murder mystery of the most notorious unsolved murder case in New York history.

recommendations.title: Body Cam
recommendations.overview: As a police officer investigates the gruesome murder of her colleague, she discovers that a mysterious supernatural force is behind it.

recommendations.title: Into the Labyrinth
recommendations.overview: When a kidnapping victim turns up alive after fifteen years, a profiler and a private investigator try to piece together the mystery.
